summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TradeLife authentication UI. Both login and signup pages are fully functional with proper validation, navigation, and styling.

design_issues.issue: Loading state text doesn't change to 'Logging in...' or 'Creating account...' during submission

passed_tests: Login page renders with correct title and all elements
Login page empty field validation works
Login page invalid credentials validation works
Signup page renders with correct title and all elements
Signup page empty field validation works
Signup page short password validation works
Both pages properly centered with Tailwind CSS
No blank screens on either page
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6), Frontend: 95% (14/15 - minor loading state issue)
